Creates a styled tab title text node.

TextField for editing the game's title.

Gets the current timestamp.
title - Variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game

toString() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Returns a formatted string representation of the game.
toString() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Platform
Returns platform name as string representation.
